description: Worker-Mode delegation hooks. (1) PreToolUse force-delegate: a default hard-gate that DENIES the orchestrator's own write/test-class tool calls (Write/Edit/MultiEdit of code/spec, write/test-class Bash) and returns guidance to delegate to a subagent; it ALLOWS delegation (Task/Agent), reads, light scheduling Bash, and writes to scheduling outputs (paths with state/status/progress/journal/handoff/decision). Subagents' own calls pass (detected via agent_id). Set WORKER_FORCE_DELEGATE=off to disable; the hook fails open on any internal error. (2) SubagentStop record-worker: pure observer, appends one JSONL record per worker. (3) SessionStart check-config: non-blocking WORKER_LOG_PATH reminder. The fail-loud hard stop for a missing log path lives in record-worker.mjs.
